subcodes.first_line: O ye two enchanted lovers of the Covenant! Until the power of attraction is manifest in the arena, steadfastness and firmness will not be revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مفتون میثاق تا قوت جاذبه بمیدان نیاید ثبوت و رسوخ رخ ننماید حتی ثبوت و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
